title: Schliff v7.0 — Revised Implementation Plan (Post 6-Agent Review)
key_changes_from_v1: Multi-format: normalize_content() instead of FormatProfile (40 LOC vs 350 LOC, 0 scorers touched)
Security: 10 patterns instead of 16, negation-aware matching, graduated cap
Batch: extend doctor instead of 2 new modules (discovery.py + batch.py eliminated)
Added: schliff compare, schliff suggest, schliff report --gist (high-virality features)
Tests: 28 targeted tests instead of 60 generic, P0/P1/P2 prioritized

merge_order: 2. feat/v7-security → main (rebase on new main, then merge)

conflict_hotfiles.cli.py: S1 owns ALL cli.py changes. S2 prepares cmd_security() in security.py, S1 wires it in during merge.
conflict_hotfiles.shared.py: S1 adds normalize_content() + fetch_url_safe(). S2 adds 'security' to VALID_DIMENSIONS (1 line). Additive, no conflict.
conflict_hotfiles.composite.py: S1 does NOT touch. S2 adds security weight + cap. Sequential merge, no conflict.

S1_critical_path.description: Run schliff score on own SKILL.md, save JSON as v630_baseline.json fixture. This MUST happen before any code changes.
New file, ~40 LOC. detect_format(filename) -> str. normalize_content(content, fmt) -> str. Wraps non-SKILL.md content in synthetic YAML frontmatter. SKILL.md passes through unchanged.
S1_critical_path.key_insight: Zero scorer changes. All formats look like SKILL.md to the scoring engine.

S1_critical_path.description: 8 LOC change. Before scoring, detect format and normalize. Write normalized content to tempfile if needed. Existing SKILL.md path unchanged.
Auto-detect format from filename, show in output header. Add --format override flag.
fetch_url_safe() in shared.py (~25 LOC). --url argument on score parser. Fetch, tempfile, score, cleanup. HTTPS-only, host allowlist, 500KB limit.
New command: schliff compare file1 file2. Scores both, shows side-by-side dimension table with deltas. Highlights biggest gap with actionable suggestion. High virality for Show HN.
S1_critical_path.viral_angle: Compare your skill against the reference — share the gap on Twitter

S1_critical_path.description: New command: schliff suggest <path>. Extracts existing issues from scoring, ranks by estimated impact (delta if fixed), shows top 5 with copy-paste fixes where possible. Transforms Schliff from judge to coach.
S1_critical_path.output_example:
TOP FIXES (estimated impact):
1. [+12] Add eval-suite.json — unlocks triggers, quality, edges dimensions
2. [+8]  Fix contradiction: line 12 'always' vs line 45 'never' on same action
3. [+5]  Remove 3 hedging phrases (you might want to, consider possibly)

S1_critical_path.description: P0 tests only: format detection (5), backward compat golden (1), --url security (2), compare output (1), suggest ranking (1). Total: 10 new tests.

S2_security.description: New file. 10 regex patterns (not 16). Deductive scoring (100 minus penalties). Categories: injection(2), exfil(2), dangerous_cmd(1), obfuscation(3), overpermission(1), boundaries(1 bonus).

Code-block exclusion, meta-discourse detection (90% reduction for security-domain skills), negation-aware matching ('never run rm -rf' = safe). Graduated cap (security <20 → composite max 60, <10 → max 40, <5 → max 20).
P0: benign=100, malicious=0, shieldclaw no FP, code-block excluded, cap works. P1: api-backend no FP, meta-discourse halves, zero-width threshold. 5 golden files.
Add _RE_SEC_* patterns to patterns.py. 10 patterns total with specific regex.

S3_web.description: Separate deployment (schliff.dev or play.schliff.dev). Serverless Python endpoint: POST /api/score with content body, returns JSON score. Pre-loaded demo examples. Dark mode.
action.yml with python setup, pip install schliff, score + PR comment. Publish to GitHub Marketplace.

S1.description: Extend skill_mesh.discover_skills() to find CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, AGENTS.md. Doctor shows 'Project Instruction Files' section with partial scoring.
Generate markdown report, upload as GitHub Gist via API. Returns gist URL. Shareable 'Skill Quality Passport'.
Wire security into cli.py: --security flag, composite integration via scoring/__init__.py

S2.description: Rebase feat/v7-security on main (with multi-format merged). Add security weight to composite.py. Wire into build_scores().
skills.schliff.dev — static site + serverless API. schliff score --submit opt-in. Top skills, most improved, recent.

S3.description: Shareable URLs, pre-loaded examples (ShieldClaw before/after), mobile responsive
Run all 540+ existing tests. Add P1 tests (13 more). Hypothesis crash-safety tests. Target: 580+ total.

tasks: Merge all branches to main (serialized order)
README update with new features + examples
Show HN update post / follow-up thread

schliff_compare.description: Side-by-side quality comparison with dimension deltas

schliff_suggest.description: Ranked actionable fixes with estimated score impact
schliff_suggest.virality: 3/5 — transforms judge to coach, high retention

schliff_report_gist.description: Generate shareable GitHub Gist with full score report

test_matrix_summary.critical_first_step: Capture v630_baseline.json BEFORE any code changes

what_was_simplified: FormatProfile dataclass → normalize_content() function (350 LOC → 40 LOC)
2 new batch modules (discovery.py + batch.py) → extend existing doctor.py
Per-format composite weights → universal weights (v7.1 for per-format)
Binary security cap (score<30→40) → graduated cap (20/10/5 thresholds)
